violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The dishwasher was observed spraying water against the wall during the rinse cycle. Dish machine to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3-bay until dish machine is fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken patties were placed warm in the refrigerator in a tightly packed covered container. Chicken patties were removed and placed on sheet pan. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Burgers and popcorn chicken was observed held at (125-128) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated food product above 165 degrees for fifteen secs and returned hot holding. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
